concept: Conjure an arcade experience where you're a professional dream architect constructing surreal mindscapes for clients seeking specific emotional responses. Combine symbolic elements, physics-defying structures, and archetypal characters to craft dreams that satisfy your clients' psychological needs. Prevent nightmares from contaminating your carefully designed dreamscapes by implementing subconscious security measures. Your reputation in the dreamweaving industry depends on balancing artistic expression with therapeutic effectiveness as you help clients process traumas and achieve personal growth.
